injuries.comment: The New Jersey Devils placed F Jack Hughes on Long-term Injured Reserve on Wednesday (Mar. 5). He's expected to be ready for training camp.
The Devils said that Markstrom is not participating on Thursday (Sept. 18) due to family reasons.
The Devils said on Thursday (Sept. 18) that Noesen aggravated a groin injury in the offseason and is expected to miss some time.
The Devils said on Thurssday (Sept. 18) that Kovacevic was deemed out indefinitely.
